meta.tagline: Institutions, healthcare aur businesses ke liye enterprise software.
meta.description: Cubico Technologies Pakistan ki institutions, healthcare providers aur growing businesses ke liye enterprise-grade software banati hai.

home.heroEyebrow: Enterprise software, bilkul sahi tareeqay se
home.heroTitle: Software jo aap ke business ko aagay le jaye
home.heroSubtitle: Hospital management se le kar e-commerce websites tak — aik team jo cheezein waqai deliver karti hai.
home.trustStrip: 50+ teams ka bharosa · Pakistan · UAE · UK · USA

footer.brandDesc: Websites, portals, CRMs aur marketing — duniya bhar ki businesses ke liye.

templates.metaDescription: Humari complete website templates library dekhein. Har industry, har style. Kisi bhi template pe click karein live preview ke liye, phir minutes mein apna project start karein.
templates.heroSubtitle: Apna starting point chunein. Har template mein working homepage aur extra pages hain — baaqi hum customize kar dete hain.
templates.searchPlaceholder: Name, industry ya tag se search karein…
templates.emptyTitle: "{query}" se koi template match nahi hua
templates.footerHintQuestion: Jo chahiye woh nahi mil raha?

service.featuresTitle: Sab kuch jo aap ko chahiye
service.featuresSubtitle: Built-in features jo har workflow cover karte hain.
service.pricingSubtitle: Koi hidden fees nahi. Kabhi bhi cancel ya upgrade karein.
service.planWhatsappMessage: Salaam, mujhe {service} ke {plan} plan ke baare mein aur jaanna hai
service.ctaReadySubtitle: WhatsApp pe message karein — months nahi, dinon mein live kar denge.

webdev.heroSubtitle: Koi template se larna nahi. Koi lifetime subscription nahi. Koi freelancer nahi jo ghaib ho jaye. Sirf aik team — jo banati hai, launch karti hai, aur saath rehti hai.
webdev.templatesSubtitle: Har industry. Har style. Click karke live preview dekhein.

webPricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
webPricing.subtitle: Apni zaroorat ke hisaab se plan chunein. Har plan mein brand-focused design with colour psychology shamil hai.
webPricing.detecting: Aap ki location detect ho rahi hai...
webPricing.ecommerceNote: E-commerce feature: development cost mein +{amount} extra
webPricing.supportNote: Starter plan mein delivery ke baad 3 months free adjustments hain. Growth aur Professional plans mein jab tak subscribe hain, continuous support aur updates milte hain.

starter.subtitle: Domain aur hosting aap ki
features: Domain aur hosting aap provide karein

professional.subtitle: Domain + hosting dono humari taraf se

login.signInTitle: Apne account mein sign in karein
login.successSignUp: Account ban gaya! Email check karein confirm karne ke liye, phir log in karein.
login.terms: Aagay barh kar, aap Cubico ki Terms of Service se agree karte hain.

order.chooseTemplateSub: Apni industry se closest wala chunein. Baaqi sab hum customize kar denge.
order.aboutBusinessSub: Sirf basic info — baaqi hum mil ke samajh lenge.
order.labelBusinessDesc: Aap ka business kya karta hai? (2-3 lines)
order.assetsSub: Sab optional hai — jo nahi hai woh skip karein.
order.logoUploadText: Apna logo upload karein (PNG, SVG, JPG)
order.letTeamDecide: Humari team best colors choose kare
order.placeholderColors: Jaise: Blue aur white, logo se match, earthy tones
order.placeholderReferences: Koi bhi website jis ka design pasand ho, uska link paste karein...
order.contactTitle: Hum Aap Se Kaise Contact Karein?
order.contactSub: Kam se kam aik tareeqa chahiye aap se contact ka.
order.pickPlanSub: Jo suit kare woh chunein — baad mein upgrade bhi ho sakta hai.
order.pricingNote: International pricing PKR se auto-convert hoti hai. Final invoice upar dikhi currency mein hogi.
order.reviewSub: Sab theek lage toh submit karein. Baad mein developer se chat mein kuch bhi change ho sakta hai.
whatsNextItems: Aap ke project pe foran aik developer assign hoga
Ghanton mein aap ko live preview link milega
Dashboard se kabhi bhi developer se chat karein
Pay tabhi karein jab aap khush hon — full ownership, koi lock-in nahi
order.authSubtitle: Order track karne aur developer se chat karne ke liye quick account.
order.authConfirmEmail: Email check karein confirm karne ke liye, phir wapas aa ke log in karein.
